title: Skanör-Falsterbo
writer: Henry Richter, Theodor Berthels, Edvard Persson
actors: Edvard Persson, Rut Holm, Arthur Fischer
plot: Henrik Karlsson is accused of having stolen 5,000 SEK, even though he is innocent. But to protect the real thief, who is sick in hospital, Karlsson takes the full responsibility.
